---
title: Questionnaire
---

What you see below is a sample Google Form.

<iframe src="https://forms.gle/rMnVXQ2UUqn7i5WQ6" width="640" height="1044" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>

TODO: You can now check to see your data. If you have responses from 15+ people,
download the CSV files using the names `data_survey.csv` and `data_analytics.csv`.

TODO: If you reupload those files into your GitHub Repos under the data directory,
the `Data` tab should show your data!!

TODO: Now find the ipynb file in your GitHub repo and continue with the TODOs.
